description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with clean lines, large glass windows, and multiple intersecting geometric volumes. The facade is dominated by expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, a prominent vertical brick accent, and a white exterior with gray and metallic highlights. The structure is set on a raised platform with stone retaining walls and includes a driveway leading to a covered entryway. The roofline is varied, with both flat and sloped sections, and there are several outdoor terraces and pergola-covered spaces. The landscaping includes green lawns on either side, bordered by stone walls, and the rear of the house is more enclosed with fewer windows. The overall impression is of a luxurious, contemporary urban residence designed for both privacy and openness.
description: A modern, multi-story house with large glass windows, white and gray exterior, and a mix of flat and sloped roofs, accented by brick and stone landscaping.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entryway, large glass windows, brick accent, and pergola over the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a solid white wall with a vertical brick accent and green lawn, minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with mostly solid white walls, minimal windows, and a large green lawn area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a more enclosed facade, some windows, and the stone retaining wall surrounding the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, integrated pergola, and prominent glass door framed by brick and stone accents
